features.featureTitle: On the Projects/SubDAOs page (frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx), update the project card styling so ALL project cards use the same text styling: make the text brighter/clearer (no muted/washed-out appearance), use white text for ALL card descriptions (including any bullet points), and keep the same font size and font style across ALL cards’ description content.

Generate a new AI image asset for the “TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes” project card depicting a professional virtual meeting: multiple people visible on a video conference screen, with speech bubbles and/or translation symbols, in a bright, modern design. Add the image to frontend/public/assets/generated and update the TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes project’s imageUrl in frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx to use the new asset.
